title: Simplified Flora
description: Addon that brings 3D plants and more to Simplified
body:
Simplified Flora adds 3D models for saplings, mushrooms, fungus, dripstone, amethyst, and spore blossoms.

![Mushrooms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b006663969a98cb343570b7db4747be03001e77.jpeg)

![3D Leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/86oyXq2W/images/c7a0ad41652a8cfe11d75def2fdc3d0a0215ad3e.jpeg)

**Install guide:**
1. Download [Simplified](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/jeelh-simplified)
2. Download Simplified Flora
3. Install the packs in this order

![Load Order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac4ba455ae359108eac995f2738795a2b51ed9aa.png)
